{{Quote|Your Honor, I'd like to introduce holorecordings of the defendant at the moment of the massacre: IM4-821 from street level, IM4-822 from overhead, IM4-823 from down the block…|From the [[Denon/Legends|Denon]] murder trial of [[Doctor/Legends|Dr.]] [[Cornelius Evazan/Legends|Cornelius Evazan]]|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>}}
'''IM4-822''' was a [[Mark IV sentry droid/Legends|Mark IV sentry droid]]. A holorecording made by IM4-822 was used at the murder trial of [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Cornelius Evazan/Legends|Cornelius Evazan]].

{{Droid-stub}}
